description.value: Aura faint abjuration; CL 4th; Slot wrists; Price 5,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION Typically made of leather dyed blue and decorated with star-shaped studs, these bracers are used by spellcasters who practice their art in the heat of combat. The bracers grant the wearer a +2 bonus on concentration checks made to cast defensively. Three times per day, the wearer can choose to roll a concentration check to cast defensively twice and take the better result. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Combat Casting, Craft Wondrous Item, warding weapon; Cost 2,500 gp.
